original_prompt:
I will be arriving in Paris on Sunday. Can you please provide me the the name of a restaurant which serves French cuisine that open on Sunday? Recommend me the restaurant with the best rating.
Tell me the restaurant name, rating, address, and the operating hours.
assessment_reasoning: The prompt is very clear: it gives the city (Paris), the day (Sunday), the cuisine (French), the selection criterion (highest rating), and the exact output fields required (name, rating, address, operating hours). Only minor unspecified details remain — e.g., how to break ties if multiple restaurants share the top rating, whether the user cares about a specific Sunday/time or just 'open on Sundays', or which review source to use — but none are necessary to fulfill the core request. Therefore it is slightly ambiguous but largely unambiguous.

variations.L1: I'm going to Paris on Sunday—find me something good to eat.
variations.L2: I'll be in Paris on Sunday. Recommend a French restaurant that's open that day and that you think is the best option.
variations.L3: I'm arriving in Paris on Sunday. Please recommend the highest-rated French restaurant that is open on Sunday. Tell me the restaurant's name and rating.
variations.L4: I will be arriving in Paris on Sunday. Can you please provide me the name of a restaurant which serves French cuisine that is open on Sunday? Recommend the restaurant with the best rating and tell me the restaurant name, rating, address, and the operating hours.
variations.L5: I will arrive in Paris on Sunday. Find the top-rated French restaurant that is open on Sunday. Follow these steps and return only the requested fields: 1) call get_all_restaurants_in_city with city='Paris'; 2) call get_cuisine_type_for_restaurants for those restaurants and keep only French cuisine; 3) call check_restaurant_opening_hours for the French restaurants and keep only those open on 'Sunday'; 4) call get_rating_reviews_for_restaurants for the Sunday-open restaurants and select the highest-rated; 5) call get_restaurants_address for that top restaurant. Return the restaurant name, numeric rating, full address, and operating_hours (must include 'Sunday').
